title: Delta Vanilla
description: A lightweight Vanilla+ modpack for mid-range devices that adds more adventure, exploration, challenging dungeons, and increases difficulty.
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5539f83e39292226f88ba8148f0fcc3d695c1824_0.webp)

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8be1dff814ca0fb8147314723367f8fca997faba.png)

**🌍 Exploration**

- Discover new biomes, structures, and dungeons that make the world more dangerous and rewarding to explore.

**⚔️ Combat & Classes**

- Face stronger enemies, bosses, and choose RPG-inspired classes with unique skills and abilities.

**🏰 Adventure**

- Dive into challenging dungeons, towers, and reworked structures filled with traps, loot, and surprises.

**🔮 Magic & Progression**

- Customize your playstyle with spells, runes, attributes, and a full skill system.

**🛡️ Survival & Atmosphere**

- Seasons, environmental challenges, immersive sounds, and visual details make survival more realistic and engaging.
